A

AllureSupport - Class in br.com.demo.dogapi.support
Contém utilitários para anexar evidências dos testes ao relatório Allure.
attachRequest(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class br.com.demo.dogapi.support.AllureSupport
Anexa a request HTTP enviada ao Allure.
attachResponse(String, Response) - Static method in class br.com.demo.dogapi.support.AllureSupport
Anexa o status e o corpo da resposta HTTP ao Allure.

B

BaseDogApiTest - Class in br.com.demo.dogapi.support
Classe base para os testes da Dog API.

basePath() - Static method in class br.com.demo.dogapi.config.DogApiConfig
Obtém o base path da Dog API.
baseUri() - Static method in class br.com.demo.dogapi.config.DogApiConfig
Obtém a URI base da Dog API.

BreedImagesResponse - Record Class in br.com.demo.dogapi.model
Representa a resposta do endpoint GET /breed/{breed}/images.

Representa a resposta do endpoint GET /breeds/list/all.

D

DogApiConfig - Class in br.com.demo.dogapi.config
Centraliza a configuração de acesso à Dog API utilizada pelos testes automatizados.
